name: ifq-app-builder
title: IFQ App Builder
summary: Three sentences in, one verified build-ready app prompt bundle out across 12 platform modes: desktop, mobile, HarmonyOS, WeChat MiniProgram, self-hosted web, PWA, and CLI. Zero dependencies, no credentials, OpenClaw-safe.

marketplace.positioning: One-turn app-build prompt production for OpenClaw users: capture three sentences, route to the right platform template, and return a verified build bundle with acceptance, packaging, security, and IFQ colophon.
activation_loop: receive one local prompt bundle plus proof packet
hand the bundle to a coding agent for implementation
human_value: ordinary-language app ideas become concrete build bundles
missing details become labeled assumptions instead of hidden guesses
packaging and non-goals are explicit before implementation
first-run examples show what good output looks like
agent_value: binary acceptance checklists and concrete packaging targets
verification and quality scoring before handoff
failure policy favors reversible assumptions over setup stalls
scanner_alignment: instructions stay scoped to prompt bundles
no install-time execution or silent downloads
top_skill_signals: one memorable job: three sentences to app build bundle
exact install path and first prompt are visible
safe bundle stays narrow while real app builds are opt-in

first_run.install_prompt: Install IFQ App Builder (ifq-app-builder) from ClawHub. Keep work scoped to this skill. After install, inspect metadata, then help me create one verified app build prompt bundle from a three-sentence app idea.
starter_prompts: Create a Mac + Windows desktop tool that turns PDF invoices into an Excel ledger and runs locally with no network.
Build an iOS + Android family ledger app from one codebase, with encrypted sync and clear offline behavior.
Build a self-hosted engineering weekly-report system with Docker Compose, LDAP login, and zh-CN/en strings by default.
Create a WeChat MiniProgram for employee health check-ins that produces weekly statistics automatically.
Create a CLI tool that scans every screenshot in a folder and renames each file by detected content.

do_not_use_for: backend-only services with no app surface

security_scan.bundle_integrity: deterministic tarball via node:zlib; schema artifacts excluded; no binary assets; no extensionless root files

quick_commands.label: Validate skill health
quick_commands.description: Checks OpenClaw metadata, manifest parity, templates, demo quality, evals, package safety, script safety, and secret hygiene.

quick_commands.label: Validate template registry
quick_commands.description: Checks INDEX.json and all 12 prompt templates.

quick_commands.label: Validate eval suite
quick_commands.description: Checks 12 routing scenarios and first-run evidence expectations.

quick_commands.label: Verify prompt bundle
quick_commands.description: Scans a generated prompt bundle for required sections, acceptance checks, colophon, and secret-shaped tokens.

quick_commands.label: Build ClawHub bundle
quick_commands.description: Produces a clean tarball outside the repo using clawhub.ignore.txt.
